1. Ensure that you have Java 17 or above installed.
2. Down the latest version of `InventoryBro` from [here](http://link.to/duke).
Adds a new item to the list of todo items.
* The `DEADLINE` can be in a natural language format.
`todo n/Write the rest of the User Guide d/next week`
`todo n/Refactor the User Guide to remove passive voice d/13/04/2020`
**Q**: How do I transfer my data to another computer?
* Main entry-point for the java.seedu.inventorybro.InventoryBro application.
* Represents a task with a description and completion status.
* Creates a task with the given description, marked as not done.
* Returns the status icon for display.
* Returns the task in save file format.
* @return A string formatted for writing to the save file.
* Manages the list of tasks, providing operations to add, delete, mark, and retrieve tasks.
* Creates a task list pre-populated with the given tasks.
* @param items An existing list of tasks to manage.
* Adds a item to the list.
* Removes and returns the task at the given index.
* @param index Zero-based index of the task to delete.
* Returns the item at the given index.
* @param index Zero-based index of the item.
* Returns the number of items in the list.
* Returns true if there are no tasks in the list.
